title: VPB Barrett Fire Arms
description: This mod introduces the iconic Barrett M82A1 sniper rifle into Minecraft, offering a powerful long-range weapon to players.
body:
### **About**

**Looking to expand your arsenal? This addon brings the iconic M82A1 to your favorite mod, complete with its signature 10-round magazine and **150 RPM** fire rate. Chambered in the powerful **.50 BMG**, it’s the perfect addition for those who crave precision and raw firepower. Fully compatible with the existing attachments and features of the base mod, the M82A1 slots seamlessly into your gameplay. Whether you're taking on armored foes or just enjoying some long-range action, this rifle won’t disappoint!**

###   ⚠️**go down to see how you can instal**⚠️

# ⚠️How you can install⚠️
# in Curse Forge
### Open the main folder.
![as](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07fee995bae6bda838c98aa08592d2a9c041513b_0.webp)

### **Then you'll see something like this...**
![asda](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/781a8a9413feeb9aef46c2d8ef285259ada95610.png)
### Then just drop the file into the **pointblank** folder, but don't extract the zip file!!!



# in TLauncher 
**Do basically the same:**  
**Open the main folder**
![was](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf745357b42a68dd43cd15a1a4aa18fa9cfa3166.png)

**look for the pointblank folder, and place the file there, ALSO WITHOUT EXTRACTING!!**
![wd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/759755c8aab7fc11de49fe004d0ce440be90df2c.png)
